visuals.title: Amdahl's Law Speedup Curve
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Amdahl's Law</text>
  
  <!-- Sequential Part -->
  <rect x="50" y="80" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Sequential Part (P)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Parallelizable Part -->
  <rect x="50" y="130" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parallel Part (1-P)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow showing parallelization -->
  <line x1="180" y1="150" x2="250" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <polygon points="250,150 242,145 242,155" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Parallelized Parts -->
  <rect x="250" y="100" width="80" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="250" y="130" width="80" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="250" y="160" width="80" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Speedup Formula -->
  <rect x="50" y="220" width="320" height="60" fill="#FFFFFF" rx="5" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Speedup = 1 / [P + (1-P)/N]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Where P = Sequential fraction, N = Processors
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="50" y="300" width="10" height="10" fill="#1565C0" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="65" y="309" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Sequential portion cannot be parallelized
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="200" y="300" width="10" height="10" fill="#64B5F6" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="215" y="309" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Parallel portion divided across N processors
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
